auth.title: Tapee
auth.subtitle: Your event wallet
auth.fillFields: Please fill in all required fields
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.staffNotAllowed: Staff accounts must log in via the staff app.
auth.keepMeLoggedInHint: Your session will be saved securely on this device.

home.linkBraceletHint: Visit the bank station at the event to get and link your wristband.
home.blockedHint: This wristband is blocked. Visit the bank station to unblock it.
home.refundPendingHint: Refund request submitted. Your wristband is frozen while it is being processed.
home.refundStatusPendingHint: Your request is being reviewed by the organizer.
home.refundStatusApprovedHint: Your refund was approved. Payment is on its way.
home.refundStatusDisbursementPendingHint: The money is being sent. You will receive it very soon.
home.refundStatusDisbursementFailedHint: There was a problem with the payment. Please contact the event organizer.
home.refundStatusRejectedHint: Your request was rejected. You may submit a new one if needed.
home.checkArchivedForRefunds: Check your archived wristbands to request balance refunds.
home.archivedRefundAvailable: You have balance available for refund.
home.refundDeadlinePassed: The refund request deadline has passed.
home.nfcDetectedHint: This wristband is not linked to your account yet. What would you like to do?

addBracelet.title: Add Wristband
addBracelet.scanningHint: Bring your wristband close to the back of your phone.
addBracelet.nfcHint: Tap to start NFC scan, then bring your wristband close to your phone.
addBracelet.uidHint: Enter the code printed on the wristband, with or without colons.
addBracelet.invalidUidHint: The code must be 4, 7, or 10 hex bytes (e.g. A1B2C3D4).
addBracelet.successMsg: Your wristband is now linked to your account.
addBracelet.alreadyLinkedMsg: This wristband is already linked to another account.
addBracelet.flaggedMsg: This wristband is blocked. Visit the bank station at the event.
addBracelet.eventLimitMsg: You already have a wristband linked for this event. Only one is allowed per person.
addBracelet.scanFailed: NFC scan failed. Please try again.
addBracelet.unknownBracelet: This wristband is not registered. Let's find your event.

selectEvent.title: Select Event
selectEvent.nearbyEventFound: We found an event near you.
selectEvent.noEventsHint: Please ask event staff for assistance.

unlink.title: Transfer Wristband
unlink.balanceWarning: This wristband has {{amount}} loaded. The balance stays with the wristband and will be available to whoever claims it next.
unlink.bullet1: The wristband is removed from your account
unlink.bullet2: The balance stays on the wristband — perfect for gifting
unlink.bullet3: Your personal data is cleared from the wristband
unlink.successMsg: It is now free for someone else to claim. They can link it via the app.

history.title: My Transactions
history.noTransactionsSub: Your purchases, top-ups and refunds will appear here

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptySub: Push notifications you receive will appear here

topUp.title: Top up wristband
topUp.nequiHint: Enter the phone number linked to your Nequi account
topUp.nequiInfo: You'll receive a notification on your Nequi app to confirm the payment.
topUp.pseInfo: You'll be redirected to your bank's portal to confirm the payment.
topUp.uidHint: Enter the code with or without colons (e.g. A1B2C3D4 or A1:B2:C3:D4)
topUp.pseBanksError: Could not load banks. Tap to retry.

paymentStatus.title: Payment status
paymentStatus.successMsg: Your balance has been updated. You can now use your wristband.
paymentStatus.failedMsg: The payment could not be processed. Please try again.
paymentStatus.timeoutMsg: We didn't receive confirmation. If you authorized the payment, it may take a few minutes.
paymentStatus.nequiPending: Check your Nequi app and accept the payment request.
paymentStatus.psePending: Complete the payment on your bank's portal.

block.title: Block wristband
block.confirmMessage: Are you sure? You won't be able to make purchases until visiting the bank station.
block.blockedMessage: Your wristband has been blocked. Visit the bank station to unblock it.
block.warning1: You won't be able to make purchases at any stand.
block.warning2: You can only unblock it at the bank station.
block.warning3: Your balance is safe and won't be lost.
block.unlockInfo: To unblock your wristband, visit the bank station. They'll verify your identity.

refund.title: Request refund
refund.pendingInfo: Your request will be reviewed. Refunds are processed at the end of the event or within 48 hours.
refund.confirmMessage: Send a refund request for your remaining balance?
refund.successMessage: The bank team will contact you once it's processed.
refund.alreadyPendingMessage: You already have a pending refund request for this wristband. Please wait for it to be processed.
refund.deadlinePassedMessage: The refund request deadline for this event has passed. It is no longer possible to submit a request.
refund.bankTransferIncomplete: Please complete all bank account fields.
